canonical_source_policy.rule: Before Stage 4 work, verify mandatory source availability in API 551/Source first. Active Source now excludes legacy ZIP packages. Active Stage 4 TZ is TZ_API551_PROJECT_STAGE4_CONSOLIDATED_CURRENT_2026-06-18.md. Active policy/rules source is API551_CONSOLIDATED_POLICIES_and_RULES_CURRENT_2026-06-18.md. Active universal Figure label cleanup and placement addendum is API551_UNIVERSAL_FIGURE_LABEL_CLEANUP_AND_PLACEMENT_RULES_CURRENT_2026-06-25.md. Archived ZIP packages are QA/evidence only and are forbidden as generation input for the final one-pass rebuild.

mandatory_sources.role: current consolidated Stage 4 operational TZ; replaces prior split/current TZ files after user approval on 2026-06-18

single mandatory active source for API 551 policies and rules; consolidates v5 rules ZIP, Stage2 replacement rules, Stage4 consolidated policies, and archived Stage4 corrections without information loss
mandatory_sources.read_check: metadata_ok; generated coverage register includes source sizes and SHA-256

supplemental_source_files.role: CURRENT active universal Stage 4+ addendum for Figure label cleanup, placement, protected graphics, boxed callouts, leader-line protection, and replacement text fitting; supplements API551_CONSOLIDATED_POLICIES_and_RULES_CURRENT_2026-06-18.md and must be checked before Figure production

extracted_reference_policy.rule: Archived ZIP packages remain in archive/source-packages. The extracted-reference manifest is an index of useful ZIP members for QA/audit/traceability only. The selected members are not active source and are forbidden as generation input for the final one-pass rebuild.
